description_long: This object is a vintage video game console, specifically modeled after the Atari 2600, featuring a rectangular, slightly sloped body with a series of horizontal grooves across its front and top surfaces. The front panel displays the 'ATARI 2600' logo and includes several physical toggle switches labeled for power, game selection, and color settings, all highlighted with orange text. The central area contains a cartridge slot, flanked by the switches, and the top surface is mostly matte black plastic with a ribbed texture. The sides are plain, with the switches and controls only visible from the front and top. The back is featureless except for the continuation of the ribbed design. This object is compact and lightweight, designed to rest on a flat surface such as a table or entertainment center.
description: A classic Atari 2600 video game console with a ribbed black plastic body, toggle switches, and a cartridge slot on the front panel.
description_view_0: Front view showing the Atari 2600 logo, toggle switches, cartridge slot, and all control labels.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the sloped profile and ribbed texture, with switches visible in profile.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a plain, ribbed surface with no visible controls or branding.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the sloped body and ribbed texture, with switches in profile.
